title: Buttery Velvety Cardomom Grill
description: A show-off Croatian dish featuring ground cardamom in a buttery, velvety sauce for grilled meats or vegetables, perfect for Mediterranean-friendly meals.

ingredients.name: 1 lb ground beef
ingredients.notes: Use leaner cuts to ensure the dish doesn't become too greasy.

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup butter
ingredients.notes: Choose a high-quality, unsalted butter for best flavor.

ingredients.name: 1 teaspoon ground cardamom
ingredients.notes: Add a touch of spice without overpowering the dish.

ingredients.name: Juice of 2 lemons
ingredients.notes: Provides acidity to balance the richness of the sauce.

ingredients.name: 1 large egg yolk
ingredients.notes: Enhances creaminess and depth of flavor.

instructions: Gently heat a skillet over medium heat. Add butter and let it melt.
Once melted, add ground beef to the skillet in small batches, cooking until browned on all sides. Remove from pan and set aside.
In the same pan, using the remaining fat, sauté lemons with a pinch of salt until they release their juices. Add cardamom powder into the mixture.
Return the beef to the skillet, reduce heat, and add the egg yolk. Stir continuously for about 1-2 minutes until fully combined and sauce is smooth.
Season with salt and pepper to taste. Serve over grilled vegetables or meats for a mediterranean twist.
Cook ground beef to an internal temperature of 71°C / 160°F (no longer pink in the middle) before serving.
